summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. Used the cluster preflight artifact as live state where present; no GitHub mutations, merges, labels, comments, or fixes planned. Most hydrated open PRs are retained for maintainer review because this shard is not a dedupe cluster and merge/fix actions are blocked. Missing job refs are scoped needs_human because they were not present in the provided live preflight artifact.
